---
title: "Home"
---

# Calvin Burzynski

Welcome! I’m Calvin Burzynski, a Data Analytics major interested in public health, sports analytics, and economic analysis.

## What you’ll find here
- A few projects I’m proud of
- The tools I use (R, Python, SQL, Power BI, Excel)
- Ways to contact me

::: callout-note
**Tip:** This site is built with Quarto. It’s designed to be reproducible and easy to update as your work evolves.
:::

## Quick highlights
- **Skills:** R, tidyverse, SQL, data visualization, statistical modeling  
- **Interests:** (add 2–3)  
- **Currently seeking:** internships / research / full-time roles (optional)

## Contact
- Email: burzyn_c1@denison.edu  
- GitHub: https://github.com/burzyn-c1  
- LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/calvin-burzynski
